themes.definition: Users are presented with a 'logged in' state upon arrival without having logged in or registered, causing confusion.

examples.quote: Ah, it says 'Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps.' That's odd. I didn't log in. Survey Corps? I wasn't expecting that name. Confusing.
Definitely the 'Welcome back!' and 'Successfully logged in' message right when I landed on the page, even though I hadn't even registered yet. That just made no sense and immediately put me off.
Okay, I'm on the tasks page. ... And it says Welcome back! Successfully logged in to Survey Corps. Hmmm, I guess I'm already logged in?
That business about being logged in already when I hadn't even registered!
Okay, tasks page. Let's see what this thing is all about. Already logged in? Survey Corps? What is this, Attack on Titan fan fiction?

themes.definition: The absence of a clear or functional registration process on the landing page.

examples.quote: I've clicked around for a while and I can't find a registration form at all. I'm guessing the task to register is impossible to complete without the feature even existing on the page.
The product needs a clear and functional registration process and a fix for the false 'logged in' state.
Login/Registration options on the main Tasks page. Like, front and center. It's kind of the most basic thing!

themes.definition: Tasks failing to load or taking an excessively long time to load.

examples.quote: It also has a loading indicator. Hmm.. It is stuck on loading.. I am logged in but there are no tasks here.
Loading tasks...' Seriously? Still loading? How many tasks do they have, the entire backlog of Jira?

themes.definition: The user interface is perceived as overwhelming, complicated, or not intuitive.

examples.quote: Well, it seemed… busy. A lot going on. I wasn't quite sure where to start. A bit overwhelming, to be honest.
Clunky. Not intuitive. Feels like it was designed by someone who doesn't actually *use* software.
Lot of things to click on... 'Categories', 'Priorities', 'Deadline'... Oh dear.

themes.definition: Confusion arising from the unexpected 'Survey Corps' branding and the lack of clear association with the intended purpose of the application.

examples.quote: Definitely the 'Successfully logged in to Survey Corps' message. I didn't log in, and I have no idea what 'Survey Corps' is supposed to be. That's just bizarre and unprofessional.
Already logged in? Survey Corps? What is this, Attack on Titan fan fiction?

themes.definition: Difficulty locating or understanding the purpose of the 'Mission Dashboard'.

examples.quote: Trying to find the damn 'Mission Dashboard'! Why isn't it the landing page after login? Why is it buried as a tiny tab? That's UX 101 stuff.
Mission Dashboard? What mission? I thought this was for gardening. Where is this 'Mission Dashboard'? I can't see a button or link for it.
